alkylation reagent: 10µL of 375mM iodoacetamide (IAA) was also added to the sample
cleavage agent: 5µL (5µg) of trypsin was added per tube
enrichment method: Phosphopeptide enrichment was performed using TiO2 spin tips
fragmentation method: using CID-MSA for the identification of MS2
instrument: analyzed by LC–MS/MS using a 90-min gradient on Orbitrap Eclipse
labeling: using TMT10plex™ Isobaric Mass Tagging Kit
reduction reagent: 10µL of 200mM TCEP was added to each tube
